creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 254206
Patch for Clipper2

* Use upstream release archive as recommended by Porters Handbook
* Set USES= compiler:c++17-lang and pathfix
* Remove CMAKE_SOURCE_PATH and use WRKSRC_SUBDIR + NO_WRKSUBDIR
* Don't build tests

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.1 (amd64)

Compile tested in Poudriere using FreeBSD 14.1 (amd64) with cad/openscad
